basic_details.job_title: ECHS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Medical Specialist and Medical Officer Posts
basic_details.short_information: Ex Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) Medical Specialist and Medical Officer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.echs.gov.in/. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the ECHS Medical Specialist and Medical Officer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MD/MS in Specialty concerned/ DNB, MBBS
qualification.details: Medical Specialist: MD/MS in Specialty concerned/ DNB Medical Officer: MBBS

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs 1,30,000/- for 5 hours (Medical Specialist), Rs 95,000/- for 8 hours (Medical Officer)
salary_details.details: Medical Specialist: Rs 1,30,000/- for 5 hours Medical Officer: Rs 95,000/- for 8 hours

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ECHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the ECHS recruitment is 18th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts available in this ECHS recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment drive by ECHS offers positions for Medical Specialist and Medical Officer. There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for these posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: For the Medical Officer position, candidates must possess an MBBS degree. This is the minimum educational qualification required for this role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Medical Specialist role?
faq.answer: The Medical Specialist post offers a salary of Rs 1,30,000/- for 5 hours of work per day. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for ECHS recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this ECHS recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the ECHS Medical Specialist and Medical Officer posts?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, and send it to the address specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these ECHS positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Medical Specialist and Medical Officer posts in ECHS will be based on an interview. Candidates shortlisted will be called for an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for ECHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification for ECHS recruitment can be downloaded from the official website of ECHS. A direct link is usually provided in the 'Important Links' section of job portals.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these ECHS vacancies?
faq.answer: The positions of Medical Specialist and Medical Officer under this ECHS recruitment are on a contractual basis. This means the employment is for a fixed tenure.

faq.question: Q10. Which state and city are these ECHS vacancies located in?
faq.answer: These ECHS vacancies are located in Joshimath city, Uttarakhand state. Candidates applying should be willing to work in this location.
